goal: Forensic audit of v10 microstructure overlay: verify reproducibility, detect leakage, confirm same-window improvement, and deliver a final CONFIRMED / DOWNGRADED / REJECTED verdict.
global_constraints: Immutable reference is active-signal-v1@1 — never modify or re-tune the base.
No new features, no new directional scouts, no early-cut, no label changes allowed.
All comparisons must use identical train / selection-OOS / lockbox windows.
Short-only, long-only, and combined veto must be tested in separate independent runs — never aggregated.
Rule-based (threshold / bucket) overlay must be validated before any model-backed overlay.
PROMOTE verdict only after every forensic block passes; any confirmed leakage triggers REJECTED.
No mixing of reproduction checks, leakage checks, and new ideas in the same run.

slices.title: Negative controls and robustness
slices.hypothesis: Stress-test the overlay result with placebo thresholds, perturbations, and time-slice splits to rule out accidental fit.
slices.objective: Stress-test the overlay result with placebo thresholds, perturbations, and time-slice splits to rule out accidental fit.
success_criteria: Robustness verdict per test: result is stable, fragile, or artifact-driven.
evidence_requirements: Robustness verdict per test: result is stable, fragile, or artifact-driven.

slices.title: Финальный вердикт по v11
slices.hypothesis: Synthesize all audit findings into a single forensic verdict on the v10 microstructure overlay.
slices.objective: Synthesize all audit findings into a single forensic verdict on the v10 microstructure overlay.
success_criteria: Final forensic verdict recorded: CONFIRMED, DOWNGRADED TO WATCHLIST, or REJECTED with full justification.
evidence_requirements: Final forensic verdict recorded: CONFIRMED, DOWNGRADED TO WATCHLIST, or REJECTED with full justification.
